name: position
description: Tools for Portfolio position monitoring & reconciliation on the ayunit MCP. Reads v_AccountPosition (book of record) and reconciles against v_CustodyPosition (broker snapshot) — quantity/cost reconciliation, missing-asset detection, and onboarding/inception seeding. Custody↔asset mapping (Portfolio.AssetCustody) lives in the asset plugin; this plugin's skills only insert mappings as a side-flow when resolving untranslated custody tickers.
